sections.paragraph:
Original: לבּי לוּבי

Transliteration: lûbı̂y lûbbı̂y

Phonetic: loo-bee'

BDB Definition:

Libyans = "empty-hearted (Dan 11:43)"

Libyans = "afflicted (Jer 46:9)"

  1. a people of northern Africa west of Egypt

Origin: partrial from a name probably derived from an unused root meaning to thirst

TWOT entry: None

Part(s) of speech: Noun
